raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version property from 11 to 17.
raspberrypi-boot-bmp085/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with the target JDK 17 environment if the source/target version remains at 11.

raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.6.1 to support Java 17.
raspberrypi-boot-gdata/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.x does not support Java 17; upgrading to 2.6.x is required for compatibility.
The project target is migrating to Java 17, so the build configuration must reflect this.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to 2.6.1 to align with Java 17 support and receive security/bug fixes.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.x does not officially support Java 17; using it with Java 17 may cause runtime failures due to internal API changes (e.g., module system restrictions) or lack of compatibility testing.

raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to target the new JDK version.
raspberrypi-boot-pushover/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 17 features or enforce Java 17 compatibility checks.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Boot parent version to 2.6.1 to support Java 17.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.4.x does not support Java 17; upgrading to 2.6.x is required for compatibility.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Set Java source and target version to 17.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 17; the build must target this version.

raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace manual Netty and Reactor dependencies with the Spring Boot starter.
raspberrypi-boot-server/pom.xml.why_exists: Manual dependencies for reactor-net and netty-all are deprecated or incompatible with newer Spring Boot versions; the starter manages compatible versions.
